articles.value: Y'shtola, Night's Blessed Rises to 3rd Most Popular Commander
articles.excerpt: Y'shtola, Night's Blessed has deposed Atraxa, Praetors' Voice to become the 3rd most popular commander on EDHREC's ranked list!
Which cards are heating up, or cooling down, for the most popular commander on EDHREC, The Ur-Dragon? Let's find out.

container.description: Popular decks and cards for The Ur-Dragon
container.title: The Ur-Dragon (Commander) - Optimized
